estimate_raw: - Expected complete path seconds: about `2050-2250` based on round-3 observed validation runtime `1904.29s` plus negligible additional grid-search cost over already-computed OOF matrices.
- Expected complete path seconds: about 850-1050, dominated by adding one more three-fold two-epoch transformer run to the round-3 parent.

expected complete path stays close to the observed round-6 runtime because the patch adds a single extra linear pass over train rows during asset building plus a small amount of candidate generation on unresolved rows. Expected runtime is roughly `420-520` seconds based on round-6 `387.65s` plus extra suffix-map extraction and slightly larger candidate tables. Dominant cost units remain full-train CSV load, context-column materialization, grouped map builds, candidate-table expansion for unresolved rows, and LightGBM fitting on capped candidate rows. No extra folds, seeds, or model families are added; optional work is none because the current requirement is one bounded material patch, not breadth expansion.
- Expected complete path seconds: same order as the parent intended route, bounded by 4 folds of a compact MIL network over 206 train records plus one full-data refit.
- Expected complete path seconds: about 3000 to 4200 seconds.
- Expected complete path seconds: roughly 600-750 based on round-1 observed 442 seconds and one extra request-embedding pass while keeping the same fold count and candidate count.
